content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Mon, 16 Feb 2026 04:50:44 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 213 | Critical: 71 | High: 29 | Medium: 18 | Low: 95

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] Netanyahu calls for dismantling Iran’s nuclear programme in any US deal (Al Jazeera)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Trump would back Israeli strikes on Iran missile program if US - Iran talks fail : Report (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran open to compromises to reach nuclear deal with U . S ., but rules out linking missiles and other issues – Ya Libnan (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] U . S . Deploys USS Gerald R . Ford To Middle East As Trump Pressures Iran On Nuclear Deal (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] Kim Jong-un unveils housing for families of North Koreans killed in Ukraine war (The Guardian)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (49 events, 27 critical, 10 high):
    - Netanyahu calls for dismantling Iran’s nuclear programme in any US deal
    - Trump would back Israeli strikes on Iran missile program if US - Iran talks fail : Report
    - Iran open to compromises to reach nuclear deal with U . S ., but rules out linking missiles and other issues – Ya Libnan
  Ukraine/Russia (10 events, 3 critical, 3 high):
    - Kim Jong-un unveils housing for families of North Koreans killed in Ukraine war
    - Ukrainian slider's Olympics over as helmet appeal dismissed
    - How Russia’s Invasion is Impacting Ukraine’s Youth
  Europe (39 events, 14 critical, 3 high):
    - How an undercover cop foiled an IS plot to massacre Britain’s Jews – podcast
    - Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
  Indo-Pacific (39 events, 4 critical, 2 high):
    - Satellite images from China show expansion of secret nuclear weapons facilities in Sichuan : Report
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
  United States (7 events, 2 critical, 3 high):
    - US military used Anthropic’s AI model Claude in Venezuela raid, report says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - US boards second oil tanker in Indian Ocean after it fled Venezuelan raid
  Global (50 events, 12 critical, 7 high):
    - ‘People want to help’: Canadians rally round Tumbler Ridge after school shooting
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source
    - New information warfare squadrons will increase readiness and lethality at sea: Officer

Sources: Al Jazeera, GDELT, The Guardian, Middle East Eye, BBC World, NYT World, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, BBC Africa, Defense News, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, NK News, BBC Middle East, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, BBC Asia, The Diplomat
